title: taraxacum mongolicum var. formosanum
intro: Taraxacum mongolicum var. formosanum, also known as Formosan dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Taiwan. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum mongolicum var. formosanum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Taraxacum mongolicum var. formosanum is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
